@@ -1,3 +1,8 @@
+from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify
+
+api = Blueprint('api', __name__)
+
+@api.route('/webhook/ingest', methods=['POST'])
+def handle_webhook():
+    data = request.json
+    return jsonify({"status": "ok"})
 import os
